```{r}
# --- Libraries ---------------------------------------------------------------
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(terra)
library(tidyterra)
library(ggnewscale)
library(scico)
library(cowplot)
library(tigris)   # for CA boundary
library(ggspatial)


options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)
sf_use_s2(FALSE)

# --- Palette (8 discrete colors for classes 0..7) ----------------------------
# Palette: blue → yellow → orange → red (8 steps for 0..7)
suit_grad <- colorRampPalette(c(
  "#1e3e95",  # deep blue
  "#8fb0d9",  # light blue
  "#F2D544",  # yellow (midpoint)
  "#F5CA96",  # light orange
  "#F1853F",  # orange
  "#CC331A"   # red
))
pal <- setNames(suit_grad(8), as.character(0:7))


# --- Helper: nice labels -----------------------------------------------------
.pretty_labels <- function(model) {
  if (grepl("2000_2023", model)) {
    list(model_pretty = "2000 to 2023",
         subtitle = "Current conditions\nEcorelevant period aggregate models")
  } else if (grepl("MIROC45", model)) {
    list(model_pretty = "end of century",
         subtitle = "MIROC 4.5\nEcorelevant period aggregate models")
  } else {
    list(model_pretty = "end of century",
         subtitle = "MIROC 8.5\nEcorelevant period aggregate models")
  }
}

# --- Helper: load Central Valley polygon (projected on demand) ---------------
load_cv <- function(target_crs) {
  cv <- vect(here("data", "ds2632", "ds2632.gdb")) |> project(target_crs)
  cv
}

# --- Helper: load CA polygon (projected on demand) ---------------------------
load_ca <- function(target_crs) {
  ca <- tigris::states(progress_bar = FALSE) |>
    sf::st_as_sf() |>
    dplyr::filter(STUSPS == "CA") |>
    vect() |>
    project(target_crs)
  ca
}

# --- Find (or build) the CA/CV sum rasters for a model -----------------------
resolve_sum_rasters <- function(model) {
  # candidate folders (edit/add if yours differ)
  base_dirs <- c(
    here("data", "agg_models_072925", "jg_models_072925", "p10"),
    here("data", "agg", "maxent_outputs_072925", "p10"),
    here("data", "agg_models_072925", "p10")
  )

  ca_name <- paste0(model, "_lowFilter_sum_CA_072925.tif")
  cv_name <- paste0(model, "_lowFilter_sum_CV_072925.tif")
  gen_name <- paste0(model, "_lowFilter_sum_072925.tif")

  # Try direct CA/CV first
  f_CA <- NULL; f_CV <- NULL
  for (bd in base_dirs) {
    cand_ca <- file.path(bd, ca_name)
    cand_cv <- file.path(bd, cv_name)
    if (file.exists(cand_ca)) f_CA <- cand_ca
    if (file.exists(cand_cv)) f_CV <- cand_cv
  }

  # Fallback: recursive search under data/
  if (is.null(f_CA) || is.null(f_CV)) {
    hits_ca <- list.files(here("data"), pattern = paste0("^", ca_name, "$"),
                          recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
    hits_cv <- list.files(here("data"), pattern = paste0("^", cv_name, "$"),
                          recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
    if (length(hits_ca)) f_CA <- hits_ca[1]
    if (length(hits_cv)) f_CV <- hits_cv[1]
  }

  # If still missing, try to build from generic sum by cropping
  if (is.null(f_CA) || is.null(f_CV)) {
    gen_hits <- c(
      unlist(lapply(base_dirs, function(bd) file.path(bd, gen_name))),
      list.files(here("data"), pattern = paste0("^", gen_name, "$"),
                 recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
    )
    gen_hits <- gen_hits[file.exists(gen_hits)]
    if (length(gen_hits)) {
      gen <- rast(gen_hits[1])          # generic statewide sum
      crs_target <- crs(gen)
      ca <- load_ca(crs_target)
      cv <- load_cv(crs_target)

      # Build temporary CA/CV tifs next to the generic file
      out_dir <- dirname(gen_hits[1])
      f_CA <- file.path(out_dir, ca_name)
      f_CV <- file.path(out_dir, cv_name)
      writeRaster(crop(gen, ca, mask = TRUE), f_CA, overwrite = TRUE)
      writeRaster(crop(gen, cv, mask = TRUE), f_CV, overwrite = TRUE)
    }
  }

  if (is.null(f_CA) || is.null(f_CV) || !file.exists(f_CA) || !file.exists(f_CV)) {
    stop(paste0(
      "Couldn't locate or build CA/CV rasters for ", model, ".\n",
      "Searched under:\n  - ",
      paste(normalizePath(base_dirs, mustWork = FALSE), collapse = "\n  - "),
      "\nMake sure files named:\n  ", ca_name, "\n  ", cv_name,
      "\nexist somewhere under your project 'data/' folder."
    ))
  }

  message("Using files:\n  CA: ", f_CA, "\n  CV: ", f_CV)
  list(CA = f_CA, CV = f_CV)
}

# --- Main plotting function ---------------------------------------------------
p10VisualizeAgg <- function(model) {
  message("Rendering: ", model)
  f <- resolve_sum_rasters(model)

  input_rast_CA <- rast(f$CA); names(input_rast_CA) <- "sum"
  input_rast_CV <- rast(f$CV); names(input_rast_CV) <- "sum"

  # categorical classes 0..7 so legend shows all bins
  input_rast_CA <- tidyterra::mutate(input_rast_CA, sum = factor(sum, levels = 0:7))
  input_rast_CV <- tidyterra::mutate(input_rast_CV, sum = factor(sum, levels = 0:7))

  # grey mask over CA (so CV pops)
  CV_mask <- terra::ifel(!is.na(input_rast_CV[[1]]), 0, NA)

  labs_list <- .pretty_labels(model)

  # --- inset (CV) with legend, scale bar, north arrow
plot_CV <- ggplot() +
  geom_spatraster(data = input_rast_CV, aes(fill = sum), show.legend = TRUE) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Number of species suitable",          # legend title
    values = pal, drop = FALSE, na.translate = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "bottom",
    legend.box        = "vertical",               # stack title above keys
    legend.justification = "center",
    legend.key.width  = unit(0.7, "cm"),
    legend.key.height = unit(0.5, "cm"),
    legend.spacing.x  = unit(0.25, "cm"),
    legend.title      = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 10),
    legend.text       = element_text(size = 10),
    text              = element_text(family = "Times")
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(
    title.position = "top",   # put title on top
    title.hjust    = 0.5,     # center the title
    nrow = 1, byrow = TRUE,
    label.position = "bottom" # 0–7 under the swatches
  )) +
  ggspatial::annotation_scale(location = "bl", width_hint = 0.25,
                              text_cex = 0.8, line_width = 0.3,
                              pad_x = unit(0.25, "cm"), pad_y = unit(0.25, "cm")) +
  ggspatial::annotation_north_arrow(location = "bl", which_north = "true",
                                    style = ggspatial::north_arrow_nautical(
                                      fill = c("grey35","grey85"), line_col = "grey10"),
                                    height = unit(1.1, "cm"), width = unit(1.1, "cm"),
                                    pad_x = unit(0.25, "cm"), pad_y = unit(1.10, "cm"))



  # --- full CA with greyed CV overlay
  plot_CA <- ggplot() +
    geom_spatraster(data = input_rast_CA, aes(fill = sum), show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = pal, drop = FALSE, na.translate = FALSE) +
    guides(fill = "none") +
    ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +
    geom_spatraster(data = CV_mask, na.rm = TRUE) +
    scale_fill_gradientn(colours = c("grey20", "grey21"), na.value = "transparent") +
    theme_void() +
    theme(legend.position = "none")

  # compose inset
  plot_inset <- cowplot::ggdraw(plot = plot_CV) +
    cowplot::draw_plot(plot_CA, x = 0.48, y = 0.48, width = 0.4, height = 0.4)

  # save next to the p10 folder in use
  figs_dir <- file.path(dirname(dirname(f$CA)), "figs")
  dir.create(figs_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  out_png <- file.path(figs_dir, paste0(model, "_lowFilter_sum_072925.png"))

  ggsave(out_png, plot = plot_inset, scale = 1.25, bg = "white",
         units = "px", width = 1440, height = 1920)

  plot_inset
}


# --- Run the three figures ----------------------------------------------------
p1 <- p10VisualizeAgg("2000_2023")
p2 <- p10VisualizeAgg("MIROC45_2070_2099")
p3 <- p10VisualizeAgg("MIROC85_2070_2099")


p1
p2
p3
```


#Put it all together with legend, north arrow, and scale bar 

```{r}
# Panel letters
.panel_letter <- function(model) {
  if (grepl("2000_2023", model)) "A"
  else if (grepl("MIROC45", model)) "B"
  else "C"
}

# --- Fixed p10VisualizeAgg (uses fontfamily, p1 compass only, p3 legend only) ---
p10VisualizeAgg <- function(model, show_compass = FALSE, show_legend = FALSE) {
  message("Rendering: ", model)
  f <- resolve_sum_rasters(model)

  input_rast_CA <- rast(f$CA); names(input_rast_CA) <- "sum"
  input_rast_CV <- rast(f$CV); names(input_rast_CV) <- "sum"

  input_rast_CA <- tidyterra::mutate(input_rast_CA, sum = factor(sum, levels = 0:7))
  input_rast_CV <- tidyterra::mutate(input_rast_CV, sum = factor(sum, levels = 0:7))
  CV_mask <- terra::ifel(!is.na(input_rast_CV[[1]]), 0, NA)

  # CV map (legend present here but we can hide it later)
  plot_CV <- ggplot() +
    geom_spatraster(data = input_rast_CV, aes(fill = sum), show.legend = TRUE) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      name = "Number of species suitable",
      values = pal, drop = FALSE, na.translate = FALSE
    ) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(
      legend.position     = "bottom",
      legend.box          = "vertical",
      legend.justification= "center",
      legend.key.width    = unit(0.9, "cm"),
      legend.key.height   = unit(0.5, "cm"),
      legend.spacing.x    = unit(0.25, "cm"),
      legend.title        = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12),
      legend.text         = element_text(size = 10),
      text                = element_text(family = "Times")
    ) +
    guides(fill = guide_legend(
      title.position = "top",
      title.hjust    = 0.5,
      nrow = 1, byrow = TRUE,
      label.position = "bottom"
    ))

  if (isTRUE(show_compass)) {
    plot_CV <- plot_CV +
      ggspatial::annotation_scale(
        location = "bl", width_hint = 0.25,
        text_cex = 0.8, line_width = 0.3,
        pad_x = unit(0.25, "cm"), pad_y = unit(0.25, "cm")
      ) +
      ggspatial::annotation_north_arrow(
        location = "bl", which_north = "true",
        style = ggspatial::north_arrow_nautical(
          fill = c("grey35","grey85"), line_col = "grey10"
        ),
        height = unit(1.1, "cm"), width = unit(1.1, "cm"),
        pad_x = unit(0.25, "cm"), pad_y = unit(1.10, "cm")
      )
  }

  # CA background with greyed CV
  plot_CA <- ggplot() +
    geom_spatraster(data = input_rast_CA, aes(fill = sum), show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = pal, drop = FALSE, na.translate = FALSE) +
    guides(fill = "none") +
    ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +
    geom_spatraster(data = CV_mask, na.rm = TRUE) +
    scale_fill_gradientn(colours = c("grey20", "grey21"), na.value = "transparent") +
    theme_void() +
    theme(legend.position = "none")

  # Compose maps with panel letter
  upper <- cowplot::ggdraw() +
    cowplot::draw_plot(
      plot_CV + theme(legend.position = if (show_legend) "bottom" else "none"),
      x = 0, y = 0, width = 1, height = 1
    ) +
cowplot::draw_label(
  label = .panel_letter(model),  # "A","B","C"
  x = 0.985, y = 0.985,          # top-right corner of the panel
  hjust = 1, vjust = 1,
  fontface = "bold", size = 18, fontfamily = "Times"
    ) +
    cowplot::draw_plot(plot_CA, x = 0.48, y = 0.48, width = 0.4, height = 0.4)

  if (isTRUE(show_legend)) {
    # Centered, full-width legend stacked below map (p3 only)
    legend_g <- cowplot::get_legend(
      plot_CV +
        guides(fill = guide_legend(
          title.position = "top", title.hjust = 0.5,
          nrow = 1, byrow = TRUE, label.position = "bottom"
        )) +
        theme(
          legend.position     = "bottom",
          legend.box          = "horizontal",
          legend.box.just     = "center",
          legend.justification= "center"
        )
    )
    cowplot::plot_grid(upper, legend_g, ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(1, 0.12), align = "v")
  } else {
    upper
  }
}

# --- Build the three panels with your options ---------------------------------
p1 <- p10VisualizeAgg("2000_2023",         show_compass = TRUE,  show_legend = FALSE)  # A: compass only
p2 <- p10VisualizeAgg("MIROC45_2070_2099", show_compass = FALSE, show_legend = FALSE)  # B: plain
p3 <- p10VisualizeAgg("MIROC85_2070_2099", show_compass = FALSE, show_legend = TRUE)   # C: legend only

# --- Combine into one final figure (one row) ----------------------------------
final_fig <- cowplot::plot_grid(p1, p2, p3, ncol = 3, rel_widths = c(1,1,1), align = "h")

# Save
final_path <- here::here("data","agg_models_072925","jg_models_072925","figs","sum_three_panel_072925.png")
ggsave(final_path, plot = final_fig, width = 2400, height = 900, units = "px", bg = "white")
final_fig

```

# Move legend to the right side 

```{r}
# Panel letters
.panel_letter <- function(model) {
  if (grepl("2000_2023", model)) "A"
  else if (grepl("MIROC45", model)) "B"
  else "C"
}

# --- Build ONE panel (legend-free), compass optional -------------------------
p10Panel <- function(model, show_compass = FALSE) {
  f <- resolve_sum_rasters(model)

  rCA <- rast(f$CA); names(rCA) <- "sum"
  rCV <- rast(f$CV); names(rCV) <- "sum"
  rCA <- tidyterra::mutate(rCA, sum = factor(sum, levels = 0:7))
  rCV <- tidyterra::mutate(rCV, sum = factor(sum, levels = 0:7))
  CV_mask <- terra::ifel(!is.na(rCV[[1]]), 0, NA)

  p_cv <- ggplot() +
    geom_spatraster(data = rCV, aes(fill = sum), show.legend = TRUE) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      name = "# of species",
      values = pal, drop = FALSE, na.translate = FALSE
    ) +
    theme_void()

  if (isTRUE(show_compass)) {
    p_cv <- p_cv +
      ggspatial::annotation_scale(location = "bl", width_hint = 0.25,
                                  text_cex = 0.8, line_width = 0.3,
                                  pad_x = unit(0.25, "cm"), pad_y = unit(0.25, "cm")) +
      ggspatial::annotation_north_arrow(
        location = "bl", which_north = "true",
        style = ggspatial::north_arrow_nautical(
          fill = c("grey35","grey85"), line_col = "grey10"
        ),
        height = unit(1.1, "cm"), width = unit(1.1, "cm"),
        pad_x = unit(0.25, "cm"), pad_y = unit(1.10, "cm")
      )
  }

  p_ca <- ggplot() +
    geom_spatraster(data = rCA, aes(fill = sum), show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = pal, drop = FALSE, na.translate = FALSE) +
    guides(fill = "none") +
    ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +
    geom_spatraster(data = CV_mask, na.rm = TRUE, show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_gradientn(colours = c("grey20", "grey21"),
                         na.value = "transparent", guide = "none") +
    theme_void()

  # compose (legend removed so all panels are same size)
  cowplot::ggdraw() +
    cowplot::draw_plot(p_cv + theme(legend.position = "none"),
                       x = 0, y = 0, width = 1, height = 1) +
    cowplot::draw_label(.panel_letter(model),
                        x = 0.985, y = 0.985, hjust = 1, vjust = 1,
                        fontface = "bold", size = 18, fontfamily = "Times") +
    cowplot::draw_plot(p_ca, x = 0.48, y = 0.48, width = 0.4, height = 0.4)
}

# --- Make a vertical legend grob to place on the RIGHT -----------------------
make_vertical_legend <- function(model_for_scale = "MIROC85_2070_2099") {
  f <- resolve_sum_rasters(model_for_scale)
  rCV <- rast(f$CV); names(rCV) <- "sum"
  rCV <- tidyterra::mutate(rCV, sum = factor(sum, levels = 0:7))

  base <- ggplot() +
    geom_spatraster(data = rCV, aes(fill = sum), show.legend = TRUE) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      name = "# of species",
      values = pal, drop = FALSE, na.translate = FALSE
    ) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(
      legend.position      = "right",
      legend.box           = "vertical",
      legend.justification = "center",
      legend.key.width     = unit(1.0, "cm"),
      legend.key.height    = unit(0.6, "cm"),
      legend.title         = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12),
      legend.text          = element_text(size = 10),
      legend.box.margin    = margin(t = 0, r = 16, b = 0, l = 8),
      plot.margin          = margin(t = 0, r = 16, b = 0, l = 0),
      text                 = element_text(family = "Times")
    ) +
    guides(fill = guide_legend(
      title.position = "top", title.hjust = 0.5,
      ncol = 1, byrow = FALSE, label.position = "right"
    ))

  cowplot::get_legend(base)
}

# --- Build panels (A with compass; B plain; C plain) --------------------------
p1 <- p10Panel("2000_2023",         show_compass = TRUE)
p2 <- p10Panel("MIROC45_2070_2099", show_compass = FALSE)
p3 <- p10Panel("MIROC85_2070_2099", show_compass = FALSE)

# combine the three panels (equal widths)
row3 <- cowplot::plot_grid(p1, p2, p3, ncol = 3, rel_widths = c(1,1,1), align = "h")

# build one vertical legend and attach it to the RIGHT of the combined row
legend_right <- make_vertical_legend("MIROC85_2070_2099")
final_fig <- cowplot::plot_grid(row3, legend_right, ncol = 2,
                                rel_widths = c(1, 0.20), align = "h")

# save (wider canvas so nothing clips)
final_path <- here::here("data","agg_models_072925","jg_models_072925","figs",
                         "sum_three_panel_rightlegend_072925.png")
ggsave(final_path, plot = final_fig,
       width = 2800, height = 1000, units = "px",
       bg = "white", limitsize = FALSE)

final_fig

```
